xaiItems.author: Anthropic
xaiItems.text: Anthropic is acquiring @stainlessapi, an SDK and MCP server platform that has powered every Anthropic SDK since the earliest days of our API.
xaiItems.insight: Strengthens internal tooling and MCP ecosystem control
xaiItems.impact: Tactical: accelerates agent and SDK development velocity

xaiItems.author: Anthropic
xaiItems.text: We've published a paper that explains our views on AI competition between the US and China.
xaiItems.insight: Positions Anthropic as thought leader on geopolitical AI strategy
xaiItems.impact: Strategic: shapes policy narratives and US ally coordination

xaiItems.author: Claude
xaiItems.text: Try self-hosted sandboxes today on the Claude Platform, and request access to MCP tunnels.
xaiItems.insight: Enables secure private-network agent deployment
xaiItems.impact: Tactical: lowers barriers for enterprise agent adoption

xaiItems.author: Claude
xaiItems.text: Scott Wu (@ScottWu46) runs @cognition, the team behind Devin, an AI software engineer built on Claude.
xaiItems.insight: Highlights real-world production use of Claude for frontier coding agents
xaiItems.impact: Strategic: demonstrates competitive edge in AI software engineering

xaiItems.author: OpenAI
xaiItems.text: We’re adding new ways for people to identify AI-generated images... images now also contain a SynthID watermark, and can be identified using a public verification tool.
xaiItems.insight: OpenAI is shipping technical watermarking + verification for provenance.
xaiItems.impact: Tactical: strengthens trust & compliance story ahead of regulation; strategic: positions OpenAI as responsible frontier lab.

xaiItems.author: OpenAI
xaiItems.text: Now in preview: Codex in the ChatGPT mobile app. Start new work, review outputs... all from the ChatGPT mobile app.
xaiItems.insight: Codex agents now controllable from phone while running on desktop.
xaiItems.impact: Tactical: improves developer UX and agent adoption; strategic: accelerates Codex as always-on productivity layer.

xaiItems.author: Jan Leike
xaiItems.text: To focus on this, I’ve stepped away from running alignment at Anthropic. @EthanJPerez and @sprice354_ are leading the team going forward.
xaiItems.insight: Former OpenAI safety lead shifts focus away from day-to-day alignment leadership at Anthropic.
xaiItems.impact: Strategic: signals continued emphasis on alignment but hands operational reins to next-gen team; tactical: frees Leike for new research project.

xaiItems.author: Avital Balwit
xaiItems.text: Welcome to the team! We’re so excited
xaiItems.insight: Andrej Karpathy joins Anthropic, announced same day.
xaiItems.impact: Strategic: major talent acquisition for frontier research; tactical: boosts Anthropic’s R&D credibility and education focus.

xaiItems.author: Sam Altman
xaiItems.text: chatgpt has gotten soooo much better with the latest update. really proud of the team for this one.
xaiItems.insight: Official signal of major ChatGPT improvement rollout
xaiItems.impact: tactical: boosts user retention and sets expectation for frequent model upgrades

xaiItems.author: Greg Brockman
xaiItems.text: how to use /goal in codex — keep Codex working on a persistent objective until it's solved
xaiItems.insight: Highlights persistent agentic capabilities in Codex
xaiItems.impact: strategic: positions Codex as autonomous workflow tool vs. one-shot assistants

xaiItems.author: Romain Huet
xaiItems.text: Now you can step away from your laptop and keep building with Codex from your phone. Available in ChatGPT iOS and Android now!
xaiItems.insight: Mobile-first agentic coding experience launched
xaiItems.impact: tactical: expands Codex usage beyond desktop developers to on-the-go workflows

xaiItems.author: OpenAI Newsroom
xaiItems.text: We’re rolling out Trusted Contact in ChatGPT, a new optional safety feature that helps eligible users connect with someone they trust during moments of emotional crisis.
xaiItems.insight: Safety feature expansion for emotional support scenarios
xaiItems.impact: strategic: mitigates risk in consumer AI while demonstrating responsible deployment

xaiItems.author: Alexander Embiricos
xaiItems.text: windows isn't at the quality we want yet, and we're making it a focus!
xaiItems.insight: OpenAI Codex team prioritizing Windows parity and quality improvements
xaiItems.impact: tactical: signals near-term engineering resource allocation to desktop platform expansion

xaiItems.author: Guinness Chen
xaiItems.text: You can now use your ChatGPT subscription to dictate anywhere on your desktop now!
xaiItems.insight: New voice dictation feature rolled out for Codex desktop app
xaiItems.impact: strategic: expands accessibility and productivity use cases for Codex beyond keyboard

xaiItems.author: Abhishek Bhardwaj
xaiItems.text: GPT-5.5 is now SOTA on Google's own Android Bench
xaiItems.insight: GPT-5.5 leads on Android programming benchmarks per official eval
xaiItems.impact: tactical: strengthens Codex positioning for mobile/app dev workflows

xaiItems.author: Brent Traut
xaiItems.text: Using Codex to help me with carpentry this week... Pushed it all into a Notion doc
xaiItems.insight: Internal OpenAI engineer publicly demonstrates non-coding real-world task automation with Codex
xaiItems.impact: strategic: hints at broadening agentic capabilities beyond software dev to general productivity

xaiItems.author: jason
xaiItems.text: will be fixed in the next release
xaiItems.insight: OpenAI Codex weekly limit bug from excessive merge outputs will ship fix soon
xaiItems.impact: reduces user friction for heavy Codex users in dev workflows

xaiItems.author: jason
xaiItems.text: wow they acquired autoresearch
xaiItems.insight: signals competitive M&A activity around autonomous research tooling
xaiItems.impact: may accelerate feature parity or defensive product moves at OpenAI

xaiItems.author: Peter Steinberger
xaiItems.text: no because on GB300 wouldn’t be able to parallelize requests and also give an inferior model
xaiItems.insight: Codex app server integration on GB300 hardware prioritizes model quality over parallel requests
xaiItems.impact: tactical limit on scaling concurrent Codex usage in production

xaiItems.author: Peter Steinberger
xaiItems.text: It’s macOS only, you can port it to Windows
xaiItems.insight: current Codex tooling remains macOS-first with manual Windows porting required
xaiItems.impact: limits cross-platform adoption for Windows-heavy dev teams

lowConfidence.author: jason
lowConfidence.text: will be fixed in the next release
lowConfidence.insight: OpenAI Codex weekly limit bug from excessive merge outputs will ship fix soon
lowConfidence.impact: reduces user friction for heavy Codex users in dev workflows

lowConfidence.author: Brent Traut
lowConfidence.text: Using Codex to help me with carpentry this week... Pushed it all into a Notion doc
lowConfidence.insight: Internal OpenAI engineer publicly demonstrates non-coding real-world task automation with Codex
lowConfidence.impact: strategic: hints at broadening agentic capabilities beyond software dev to general productivity

lowConfidence.author: jason
lowConfidence.insight: signals competitive M&A activity around autonomous research tooling
lowConfidence.impact: may accelerate feature parity or defensive product moves at OpenAI

meta.evidencePolicy: Facts require source URLs. Inferences require confidence and multiple or official evidence.

claudeTeam.name: DARIO
claudeTeam.lore: Anthropic CEO. Anchors the Claude side around frontier-model safety, governance, and strategic clarity.

claudeTeam.name: DANIELA
claudeTeam.lore: Anthropic president. Public company materials put her close to product and operating structure decisions.

claudeTeam.name: MIKE
claudeTeam.lore: Anthropic Labs builder. Anthropic says he moved from CPO into Labs to build experimental Claude products with Ben Mann.

claudeTeam.name: BORIS
claudeTeam.lore: Claude Code lead and high-signal product voice. Useful for spotting workflow changes before they become official copy.

claudeTeam.name: NOAH
claudeTeam.lore: Claude Code PM. Watch for product framing, launch sequencing, and user-workflow clues.

codexTeam.name: SAM
codexTeam.lore: OpenAI CEO. The Codex side inherits OpenAI's consumer distribution, capital stack, and compute narrative.

codexTeam.name: GREG
codexTeam.lore: OpenAI president and co-founder. A technical and launch-adjacent signal source for platform shifts.

codexTeam.name: FIDJI
codexTeam.lore: CEO of Applications at OpenAI. Important for how Codex and ChatGPT turn research into product and business workflows.

codexTeam.name: JAKUB
codexTeam.lore: OpenAI chief scientist. Rare posts matter because research direction changes the Codex capability curve.

codexTeam.name: TIBO
codexTeam.lore: Codex builder at OpenAI. High-signal account for practical product direction and developer workflow changes.

codexTeam.name: ROMAIN
codexTeam.lore: Head of Developer Experience at OpenAI, working on Codex and the API. Useful for developer-platform positioning.
